content: img src '  alt 'Researchers using data from macaque monkeys were able to shrink an AI vision model to a tiny fraction of its original size.'   p A new study suggests AI systems could be a lot more efficient. Researchers were able to shrink an AI vision model to 1 1000th of its original size.  p  p  Image credit  AerialPerspective Images   p  img src '

metadata.author: Jon Hamilton
